overview: A full-featured school website for BAISHNABCHAK M.C. HIGH SCHOOL with bilingual (Bengali/English) support, admin-managed notice board, login-protected teacher and student directories, and a complete admin panel for staff.
features: Bilingual Bengali/English toggle across the entire site
Public homepage with hero section, pinned notices, and latest news
Admin-managed notice board with categories, search, and pin support
Full admin panel for managing notices, teachers, and students
About, Admissions, and Contact pages with school information
Sample content preloaded with realistic Bengali school data
